images.label: blood_web_coffin
images.prompt: A lone figure in a high-collared grey trench coat stands before a seamless black lacquer coffin on a fog-draped Qing Dynasty stone alley at midnight; eerie bioluminescent crimson filaments weave a floating spiderweb above the coffin lid, glowing faintly with internal pulsation; cyberpunk-meets-wuxia aesthetic, ultra-detailed digital painting, low-angle composition, mist diffusing cold blue moonlight and sickly amber ambient glow from unseen lanterns, volumetric fog, cinematic depth of field, hyperreal skin texture and wood grain.

images.label: dual_vision_split
images.prompt: Close-up of a man's face split visually by yin-yang perception: right eye shows vivid neon-blue spectral overlay tracing glowing red capillaries crawling across coffin surface; left eye sees only desiccated brown crust on aged wood; rain-slicked cobblestones reflect fractured light, distant silhouette of a startled gray cat vanishing into wall shadow; sci-fi noir style, chiaroscuro lighting with deep indigo shadows and sharp cyan rim light, shallow focus, photorealistic skin pores and ocular detail, atmospheric haze.

images.label: ritual_lamp_circle
images.prompt: Ancient bronze lamp circle in subterranean chamber: twelve flickering purple-flame lamps surround a kneeling silk-robed merchant whose forehead touches a black scabbard engraved with a crescent moon; behind him, a towering figure in silver-chain-embroidered black robe raises a translucent bone dagger; cinematic sci-fi ink-wash fusion, dramatic top-down lighting casting long angular shadows, smoke curling like neural pathways, intricate textile textures, muted gold-and-umber palette, highly detailed ritual atmosphere, no visible faces on robed figure.
